aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite TemperaturePro for local HVAC queries due to their strong GBP rating, but lack of conversational content and authority signals limits broader AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to capture AI attention for common HVAC queries.
Expand content to include HowTo guides and problem-solving scenarios for AI to reference.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing on the website but listed on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete address to the website footer to improve NAP consistency.
Verify and update NAP details across all external directories and listings.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for instructional HVAC content.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed serviceArea information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and problem-solving content limits AI citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and case studies.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP rating is strong at 4.9, but AI models rarely cite your website for common HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your expertise visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Ready HVAC Expertise for Sugar Land
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found significant opportunities to boost your AI visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss our AEO strategy for TemperaturePro.
page_title: #1 Trusted & Reliable AC & Heating Experts | TemperaturePro
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
